text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You have been approved as a Moderator. Please review the community guidelines and reach out if you have any questions. We are glad to have you!
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You have been approved as an Event Helper. We look forward to your contributions to our events. Let us know if you need anything!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You have been approved as a Mentor. Your experience will be a great asset here. Feel free to introduce yourself in the welcome channel!
